user_query: I'm planning a basketball-themed event for my company and I need to gather information about all the NBA teams participating in the current season. Can you provide me with the full names and abbreviations of all the teams? Additionally, fetch me the details of a random NBA player. Also, calculate the love percentage between John and Alice using the Love Calculator API.

TaskList.description: Fetch the full names and abbreviations of all the NBA teams participating in the current season.
Fetch details of a random NBA player.
Calculate the love percentage between John and Alice using the Love Calculator API.
